# FakeDeathBan 
A plugin for ***Scripted*** SMP minecraft servers, like *Unstable SMP* or *Corrupted Universe*.
___
~~Ban players when they die~~
**Let players spectate the whole battle**

Most players would usually get **banned**/**kicked** off the server when they die, which would usually make players **lose engagement** and possibly even **leave the server entirely**.
### That's why I made this plugin.
It is designed to allow players to **watch fights*, *events,** **battles** and **wars** between factions when killed, **without** the need to leave the server **at all**
It also has an added benefit of slightly **lowering the server load**, because players are not constantly/frequently joining and leaving the server.
It is also very **easy to use** and **easy to set up** - it usually takes a minute or two based on your preferences.
The plugin is **HIGHLY** customizable. You can change the contents of the language files and it will get applied.
The plugin might seem *complex* at first, but once you get the hang of it, it will be **as smooth as butter**.
I highly recommend using this plugin instead of the normal ones, because this plugin is open source.


And don't worry, players **cannot** move around freely when deathbanned without a specific permission.

**Special thanks to [Vetryxx](https://modrinth.com/user/Vetryxx)**

# Features
Management GUI -- manage players

Banlist -- see which people are deathbanned

Spectator customization -- spectators can change who they are spectating

Languages -- Customize the plugin language (en_us, cs_cz, sk_sk)

Sounds -- Change death and revive sound or disable them

# Commands

|Name|Permission|Description|
|--|--|--|
|BanList|fakedeathban.banlist|Shows the list of dead players, including UUIDs|
|Check|fakedeathban.check|Checks if the plugin and its config file is healthy|
|DefaultGamemode|fakedeathban.defaultgamemode|Sets the gamemode after a revival (to use minecraft default, type `minecraft:defaultgamemode`|
|Freeze|fakedeathban.freeze|Freeze a dead player|
|Gui|fakedeathban.gui|Shows the player management GUI|
|Language|fakedeathban.language|Change the plugin language|
|Immortality|fakedeathban.immortality|Toggles immortality ON/OFF|
|SetImmunity|fakedeathban.setimmunity|Toggles a immunity for a player|
|SetSound|fakedeathban.setsound|Sets the sound after a death or a revive|
|SetSpectate|fakedeathban.setspectate|Sets the player which is spectated after death|
|ToggleFDB|fakedeathban.togglefdb|Toggle the plugin's event listeners|
|UnDeathBan|fakedeathban.undeathban|Revive a player|
|UnFreeze|fakedeathban.freeze|Unreeze a player|
|Version|fakedeathban.version|Check the plugin version|
